title: lachemilla verticillata
intro: Lachemilla verticillata, also known as rock cinquefoil, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Rosaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of lachemilla verticillata include its ability to soothe irritated skin and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
